document.docAuthor: Mondal, Debarshi, Mukherjee, Tuhar & Hazra, Niladri
document.masterDocTitle: On a new species of the genus Zavrelimyia Fittkau, 1962 (Diptera: Chironomidae) from India with cladistic relationship and a world key to the known males

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: On a new species of the genus Zavrelimyia Fittkau, 1962 (Diptera: Chironomidae) from India with cladistic relationship and a world key to the known males

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Entomology Research Unit, Department of Zoology, The University of Burdwan, Burdwan, India, 713104 & rishi 2. deb @ gmail. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0001 - 9535 - 9566
Entomology Research Unit, Department of Zoology, The University of Burdwan, Burdwan, India, 713104 & tuharmukherjeeofficial @ gmail. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0002 - 9449 - 5985
Entomology Research Unit, Department of Zoology, The University of Burdwan, Burdwan, India, 713104 & hazra. niladri @ gmail. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0001 - 8149 - 9445

heading.emphasis:
A world key to the genus
Zavrelimyia Fittkau
(males)

subSubSection.paragraph:
[
Zavrelimyia ( Zavrelimyia ) alterna ( Johannsen, 1932 )
and
Z. ( Paramerina ) ampliseta ( Hazra, Saha, Mazumdar and Chaudhuri, 2011 )
are not included in this key as they are described based on female.]

paragraph.keyLead:
1. Scutal tubercles present (NE)...................................
Zavrelimyia ( Reomyia ) wartinbei ( Roback, 1984 )

3. R 2+3 absent (OR, PA)..........................................
Zavrelimyia ( Schineriella ) schineri ( Strobl, 1880 )

8. T IX with transverse row of 3 setae (NE).........................................
Z .
( P .) hanseni ( Roback, 1971 )

- T VI-VIII entirely dark (OR)..................................
Z .
( P .) quininficia ( Chaudhuri and Debnath, 1985 )

10. Tergites with reddish brown spots (OR, AU, OC)................................
Z .
( P .) ignobilis ( Johannsen, 1932 )

- Tergites without reddish brown spots (OR)...........................
Z .
( Z .) inficia ( Chaudhuri and Debnath, 1985 )

12. T II-VIII with transverse dark bands (OR)..............
Z .
( P .) clara ( Hazra, Saha, Mazumdar and Chaudhuri, 2011 )

- T II-VIII without transverse dark bands (OR).....................................
Z .
( P .) aucta ( Johannsen, 1932 )

caption.paragraph:
FIGURES 3A–C. A. Abdomen of male
Zavrelimyia ( Paramerina ) valida ( Paul, Mazumdar and Hazra, 2013 )
; B. Hypopygium of male
Zavrelimyia ( Paramerina ) valida ( Paul, Mazumdar and Hazra, 2013 )
; C. Hypopygium of male
Zavrelimyia ( Schineriella ) schineri ( Strobl, 1880 )
. Both to scale: 50 µm.

FIGURE 4. Cladistics analysis of the species of (CI 0.43, RI 0.87)
Zavrelimyia Fittkau
; bootstrap values given above the nodes.

paragraph.keyLead:
- Wing without punctations (NT)........................................
Z .
( P .) fasciata ( Sublette and Sasa, 1994 )

18. T VIII with central longitudinal bands (AF)......................................
Z .
( P .) ababae ( Harrison, 1991 )

23. Basitarsus of mid leg about 2/3rd as long as tibia (PA, OR).............................
Z .
( P .) divisa ( Walker, 1856 )

- Basitarsus of mid leg at least as long as tibia (OR, PA)...................
Z . ( P .). togavicea ( Sasa and Okazawa, 1992 )

24. rm separated from MCu by length of FCu (NE).......................................
Z .
( P .) testa ( Roback, 1971 )

28. Cell m 1 with only one pale area (AF)................................. Z . ( P .)
nigrimarmorata (Goetgehbuer, 1935)

- Cell m 1 with two pale areas (AF).........................................
Z .
( P .) septemguttata ( Freeman, 1955 )

- Wing with double transverse bands (OR)........................................
Z .
( P .) okimaculata ( Sasa, 1990 )

32. Transverse band proximal to FCu (AF).....................................
Z . ( P .) interrupta ( Goetghebuer, 1935 )

- Transverse band distal to FCu (OR, OC)........................................
Z .
( P .) dolosa ( Johannsen, 1932 )

33. Abdomen with brown patches; AR greater than 2 (OR)..............
Z .
( P .) valida ( Paul, Hazra and Mazumdar, 2013 )

37. Abdomen pale; thorax with 4 dark vittae (OR)....................................
Z .
( Z .) facilis ( Johannsen, 1932 )

38. R 3 indistinct apically (PA)...........................................
Z .
( Z .) tusimuheia ( Sasa and Suzuki, 1999 )

- Phallapodeme indistinct (NE, PA)..............................................
Z .
( Z .) thryptica ( Sublette, 1964 )

40. Abdomen with circular patches on each segment (OR)............................
Z .
( Z .) alterna ( Johannsen, 1932 )

42. Tergites uniformly dark (OR)...............................................
Z .
( Z .) pleuralis ( Tokunaga, 1940 )

43. Tergites II-V with longitudinal bands (PA).......................................
Z .
( Z .) hirtimana ( Kieffer, 1918 )

44. Tergite VIII with two dark apical spots (PA)...................................
Z .
( Z .) signatipennis ( Kieffer, 1924 )

45. Tergites II-IV with broad transverse bands covering two third of the segments (PA)...................................................................................................
Z . ( Z .) puctatissima ( Goetghebuer, 1934 )

- Tergites II-IV with narrow transverse bands (AU)..................................
Z .
( Z .) harrisi ( Freeman, 1959 )

46. Wing with two transverse cross bands (PA)........................................
Z .
( Z .) nubila (Meigen, 1830)

- Tergite VIII completely dark (PA).................................................
Z .
( Z .) berberi Fittkau, 1962

52. Tergite VII with broad longitudinal band (PA)....................................
Z .
( Z .) melanura ( Meigen, 1804 )

- Tergite VII without broad longitudinal band (PA)..................................
Z .
( Z .) barbatipes ( Kieffer, 1911 )
